backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Disease and Medicine types, storing a map of diseases, and exposing query/update functions to initialize sample data, list all diseases, and fetch a single disease by name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three PWA features (manifest, install prompt UI, service worker) to their implementing files, related components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets PWA meta tags (theme-color, Apple web app), links the manifest, registers the service worker inline, and mounts the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for MediFind declaring standalone display mode, green theme color, portrait orientation, and two icon sizes for PWA installability.
frontend/public/sw.js: Minimal service worker that caches the root URL on install, purges old caches on activate, and uses a network-first with cache fallback strategy for GET navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing navigation state between the Disease Directory and Pharmacy Finder pages, wrapped in the Layout shell with smooth scroll-to-top on page change.
frontend/src/components/DiseaseCard.tsx: Compact card component rendering a disease's icon, name, truncated description, and medicine count badge, with visual highlight when selected.
frontend/src/components/DiseaseDetail.ts: Detail panel component showing a disease's full description, numbered medicine list with dosage notes, and a medical disclaimer, with a close button.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: Renders a dismissible banner prompting users to install the MediFind PWA, with separate flows for iOS (manual share instructions) and other browsers (native install prompt).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation between 'Disease Directory' and 'Find Pharmacy' pages, an install prompt banner, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/PharmacyCard.tsx: Displays a single pharmacy's details (name, address, phone, hours, distance) in a card, with special styling to highlight the nearest result.
frontend/src/data/pharmacies.ts: Defines the Pharmacy interface and exports a static list of 12 sample pharmacy entries with coordinates, contact info, and hours across New York City.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: Wraps the browser Geolocation API in a React hook, exposing latitude/longitude state, loading/error states, and requestLocation/reset callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInstallPrompt.ts: Manages PWA installation state by capturing the beforeinstallprompt event, detecting iOS and standalone mode, and persisting dismissal to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching all diseases, fetching a single disease by name, and triggering backend initialization, all using the ICP actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Plus Jakarta Sans fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a medical green OKLCH color theme with light/dark mode CSS variables plus custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/DiseaseDirectory.tsx: Disease Directory page that fetches all diseases from the backend, supports search filtering by name/description/medicine, and renders expandable disease cards with a detail view; auto-initializes data if none exists.
frontend/src/pages/PharmacyFinder.tsx: Pharmacy Finder page that uses the browser Geolocation API to get the user's coordinates, then sorts and displays hardcoded sample pharmacies by proximity using the Haversine formula.
frontend/src/utils/haversine.ts: Utility module exporting a Haversine formula function to calculate the distance in kilometers between two lat/lng coordinates, plus a helper to format distances as meters or kilometers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframes, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the app's version, summary, architectural notes, implemented features (disease directory, pharmacy finder, PWA manifest, theming), and image requirements for PWA icons.
